text: These are cool! I think most companies will want to use them.
RT @icreatelife: Share your GPT Image 2 experiments. Let’s collect the best use cases. I’ll share mine too.

Lots of people misunderstand what “custom timelines” are 

It is your For You timeline. You can press on For You and customize it for you. Just like this

(don’t select what you WANT to see) https://t.co/IToKAYljq4

Turn your photo to a cross stitching pattern and gift it to your Grandma or Mom 🥹

prompt: Generate an image Cross-stitch pattern conversion of this image: grid layout, rows and columns numbered, each cell = one stitch with clear color symbols/legend, limited thread palette, https://t.co/aA3VcwCyU8

I have no doubt that Google DeepMind is cooking 🔥 and we are all waiting for the new banana 🍌 or another kind of fruit. 
Just so you know despite me posting GPT Image 2 non stop, I love your models and rooting for what’s next to come! Nana Banana changed my life and so grateful
